goal: Классифицировать microstructure-сигнал в один из трёх честных статусов: confirmed true overlay, confirmed replacement layer, или watchlist/reject — через строгие parallel-free track-ветки поверх immutable reference active-signal-v1@1.
global_constraints: Immutable reference active-signal-v1@1: never modify, never retune, never change its hours/days/thresholds/execution.
All key decisions use only @1 as base reference; @3 is auxiliary comparison only, never a decision base.
Overlay and replacement are separate products: never mix them in the same narrative or run.
Simple rules first: bucket → threshold → quantile before any logistic or CatBoost.
Every threshold must have documented provenance: quantile rule or selection-OOS search with frozen lockbox.
Same-window truth: every critical comparison must run on the identical evaluation window.
No new data families, model families, or macro routes until microstructure qualification is complete.
Short/long/combined must all be tested explicitly; no short-only conclusions.
No opening new research directions until v12 reaches final verdict.

slices.title: Optional gate: early-cut or directional scout
slices.hypothesis: Conditionally open at most one further branch only if v12 has confirmed a result that warrants extension: early-cut gate for confirmed overlay, or directional scout for confirmed replacement.
slices.objective: Conditionally open at most one further branch only if v12 has confirmed a result that warrants extension: early-cut gate for confirmed overlay, or directional scout for confirmed replacement.
success_criteria: Lock/unlock decision documented with explicit condition check.
evidence_requirements: Lock/unlock decision documented with explicit condition check.
slices.gate_hint: Opens only if at least one track produced confirmed or strong watchlist result. Early-cut requires confirmed overlay + recognizable loser micro-pattern. Directional scout requires confirmed replacement + monotonic regime behavior. At most one branch opens.

slices.title: Final v12 verdict
slices.hypothesis: Deliver honest classification of the microstructure route into one of four statuses: CONFIRMED TRUE OVERLAY, CONFIRMED REPLACEMENT, WATCHLIST, or REJECTED.
slices.objective: Deliver honest classification of the microstructure route into one of four statuses: CONFIRMED TRUE OVERLAY, CONFIRMED REPLACEMENT, WATCHLIST, or REJECTED.
success_criteria: Clear documented next step based on verdict.
evidence_requirements: Clear documented next step based on verdict.
